data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that the form must be completed 24 hours before the appointment. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the form completion deadline, nor does it specify how the system enforces this requirement. The linked use case mentions a reminder 48 hours before the appointment but does not confirm the enforcement of the 24-hour completion rule, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the enforcement of the form completion deadline (24 hours before appointment).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
